raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S03 tenant scope slice as scope-compliant: it implements only canonical tenant_id scope for ControlPlaneExportModelRegistry, uses stable lfos_ lowercase snake-case tenant IDs, exports the tenant scope policy plus normalize/validate/assert helpers, references S02 identifier completion, completes only the export model registry domain model scope, does not mutate states.js or the entity registry, uses no real data, writes no product state, and hands off to RP00.P01.M10.S01. No P0/P1/P2 findings were reported. P3-01/P3-02 are confirmed by validator and tests; P3-03 and closeout dependencies are resolved by evidence and final validation.
